name: Fantastix
customerRequirements: Develop a modern, responsive website for Fantastix that reflects the company's brand identity, values, and technical capabilities.
problem: Fantastix needed a website that clearly incorporated its minimalistic design theme while effectively communicating its services, mission, and expertise in building real-time software solutions.
solution: We designed and developed a clean, modern website that aligns with Fantastix’s visual identity and philosophy. The site delivers a clear presentation of services, streamlined navigation, and a responsive layout to ensure a consistent experience across all devices.

name: PUT Building & Construction Website
customerRequirements: Develop a professional website for PUT Builders to establish a strong online presence and showcase its construction services.
problem: PUT Builders lacked an online presence, making it difficult for potential clients to discover the company, understand its services, and make contact.
solution: We designed and developed a modern, responsive website that presents PUT Builders' services, projects, and contact information clearly, helping the company build credibility and reach a wider audience online.

name: E-Commerce Platform Redesign
customerRequirements: Create a modern, mobile-first e-commerce platform with seamless checkout process, personalized recommendations, and real-time inventory management.
problem: Existing platform had high cart abandonment rates (68%), slow loading times (avg. 8s), and poor mobile experience resulting in 40% lower mobile conversions.
solution: Developed a progressive web app with server-side rendering, implemented one-click checkout, AI-powered recommendations, and real-time analytics dashboard.
solutionFeatures: Integrated payment gateway with one-click checkout
Implemented Redis caching for faster load times
Added personalized product recommendations using machine learning

testimonial.quote: The new platform exceeded our expectations. Mobile sales have tripled since launch.
testimonial.author: Michael Thompson

name: Healthcare Data Analytics Dashboard
customerRequirements: Develop a secure, HIPAA-compliant dashboard for healthcare providers to analyze patient data, track treatment outcomes, and identify trends.
problem: Healthcare providers struggled with fragmented patient data across multiple systems, making it difficult to identify patterns and improve patient outcomes.
solution: Built a unified data platform with real-time analytics, predictive modeling, and secure role-based access controls.
